titleZh: 公司法修订下股东知情权与查账权的强化
titleEn: Enhancement and Protection of Shareholder Inspection Rights under the Revision of the Company Law
abstractZh: 围绕公司法修订中的知情和查账制度，讨论股东行使知情权的边界、路径及司法实践中的争议点。
abstractEn: Analyzes the revised inspection framework, including shareholder access to accounting and governance documents and major lines of dispute in practice.
